key.name: target-host
key.description: Comma-separated list of domain names or IP addresses to measure

key.name: update-interval
key.description: How often to update metrics, in seconds

key.name: show-rtt
key.description: Display round-trip time in the top bar

key.name: show-jitter
key.description: Display jitter in the top bar

key.name: show-packet-loss
key.description: Display packet loss percentage in the top bar

key.name: show-download-speed
key.description: Display download speed in the top bar (requires a working speed test URL)

key.name: show-sparkline
key.description: Display mini history graph in the dropdown menu

key.name: enable-color-coding
key.description: Color each metric independently based on its value

key.name: ping-count
key.description: Number of ping packets to send per measurement per host

key.name: speed-test-url
key.description: Custom URL for throughput measurement. Leave empty to measure speed to the target host.

key.name: speed-test-interval
key.description: Run speed test every N update cycles. With default 10s update interval, 6 = every 60s.

key.name: rtt-threshold-good
key.description: RTT below this value is shown as green

key.name: rtt-threshold-warn
key.description: RTT below this value is shown as yellow, above as red

key.name: jitter-threshold-good
key.description: Jitter below this value is shown as green

key.name: jitter-threshold-warn
key.description: Jitter below this value is shown as yellow, above as red

key.name: loss-threshold-good
key.description: Loss below this percentage is shown as green

key.name: loss-threshold-warn
key.description: Loss below this percentage is shown as yellow, above as red

key.name: notify-on-spike
key.description: Show desktop notification when latency or packet loss exceeds thresholds

key.name: rtt-spike-threshold
key.description: Notify when RTT exceeds this value

key.name: loss-threshold
key.description: Notify when packet loss exceeds this percentage
